claim_bullets.bullet_text: All values are expressions, as demonstrated by the café Cubano example (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.19-20).
The number 42 is both an expression and a value in JavaScript (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.19-20).
String concatenation with the + operator creates expressions that are not values (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.19-20).

source_record_text: This section introduces the concept that all values are expressions in JavaScript, using a coffee shop analogy to illustrate the idea.
